home.heroSubtitle: Join Laila & Adam on a journey of sacred healing, meditation, and vibrational transformation.
home.guidesSubtitle: Two souls united in the sacred mission of healing and awakening
home.missionText: Our mission is to guide people toward holistic well-being, inner clarity, and spiritual awakening through sacred healing practices, sound, and meditation. We envision a world where every individual can access their own power, align with their true purpose, and live a life of balance, peace, and joy.
home.lailaBio: Laila is a spiritual guide, yogi, and sound healer who channels divine energy through meditation, mantra, and transformational breathwork. She empowers individuals to awaken their intuition, open their hearts, and master the mind.
home.adamBio: Adam is a grounding presence and energy practitioner who supports the healing process through vibrational medicine, meditation, and sacred guidance. His work helps individuals realign with their life purpose and inner wisdom.
home.togetherQuote: Together, we create a sacred space where miracles happen and souls remember their divine nature.
home.offerSubtitle: Comprehensive tools and guidance for your spiritual journey
home.healingDesc: Experience profound energy healing and chakra balancing for deep transformation.
home.musicDesc: Immerse yourself in 432Hz healing frequencies and custom meditation soundtracks.
home.coursesDesc: Learn ancient wisdom and modern practices through our comprehensive programs.
home.communityDesc: Connect with like-minded souls on the path of spiritual awakening.
home.stargateDesc: Weekly live sessions, Telegram community, and spiritual support for €25/month
home.certDesc: Become a certified Sacred Healing Vibration Practitioner in 12 months
home.transformDesc: Deep personal transformation with private coaching and daily support
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories from our sacred community
home.readySubtitle: Join thousands of seekers who have discovered their sacred gifts and stepped into their power. Your journey begins with a single step.

shcCoin.title: The Sacred Healing Coin
shcCoin.description1: The Sacred Healing Coin is more than a symbol—it is a gentle companion on the journey back to yourself. Infused with the vibrations of healing energy and spiritual intention, it serves as a reminder to slow down, breathe deeply, and reconnect with the inner wisdom that guides your life.
shcCoin.description2: Each coin carries the essence of freedom—freedom from old patterns, freedom to grow, and freedom to rise into the fullest version of who you are. Like healing music for the soul, its presence encourages balance, clarity, and renewal.
shcCoin.description3: Designed to inspire personal transformation, the Sacred Healing Coin also opens the path toward
shcCoin.description4: It represents alignment: when your energy is clear and your purpose awakened, abundance flows with greater ease.
shcCoin.symbolOfGrowth: A symbol of growth, a tool of empowerment, and a keeper of inner light.
shcCoin.phantomStep1: Download Phantom Wallet (mobile or browser extension)
shcCoin.phantomStep2: Create or import your wallet and add SOL (Solana)
shcCoin.phantomStep3: Open Phantom and tap the Swap icon
shcCoin.phantomStep4: Select SOL as the token you're swapping from
shcCoin.phantomStep5: Paste the SHC token address above or search "Sacred Healing Coin"
shcCoin.phantomStep6: Enter the amount and confirm the swap
shcCoin.cardStep1: Open Phantom Wallet and tap Buy
shcCoin.cardStep2: Select your preferred provider (MoonPay, Coinbase, etc.)
shcCoin.cardStep3: Enter your card details and amount to purchase SOL
shcCoin.cardStep4: Once SOL arrives, use the Swap feature
shcCoin.cardStep5: Swap your SOL for SHC using the token address above
shcCoin.cardTip: Tip: Phantom's built-in "Buy" feature lets you purchase crypto directly with your card—no external exchange needed!
